hero.tagline: Full Stack Developers | AI, LLM & Automation Experts | Web, Mobile & Desktop Apps
hero.title: Building the Future with
hero.description: At AfriDev, we help startups and tech teams build scalable, high-performance applications using modern technologies. From web and mobile apps to AI integration and DevOps, we turn complex ideas into seamless digital solutions.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for modern digital challenges

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Web Development
fullstack.description: Build high-performance web apps and integrate AI features like ChatGPT or custom LLMs. We help startups and tech teams build cloud-native, scalable applications using Python (Django/FastAPI), Node.js, React/Next.js, and more.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: Create mobile applications that help users discover and engage. We build comprehensive apps with detailed profiles, user reviews and ratings, advanced search and filtering capabilities using Flutter & FlutterFlow.

desktop.title: Desktop Application Development
desktop.description: Design and build robust, high-performance desktop applications that run seamlessly across platforms (Windows, macOS, Linux). From standalone utilities to real-time communication tools and full-scale business applications.
desktop.showcase: SmartVid AI: Automate Video Creation & Posting

ai.title: AI Apps & Integration
ai.description: Prepare for success with AI-powered solutions. We build personalized study materials, organized resources, and interactive learning tools. Integrate ChatGPT, custom LLMs, and AI automation into your products.

cloud.title: Cloud & DevOps
cloud.description: AWS infrastructure, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines for scalable cloud-native applications

consulting.title: Consulting & Optimization
consulting.description: Technical guidance, performance optimization, and architecture design for modern applications

whyChoose.title: Why Choose AfriDev
whyChoose.subtitle: We're committed to delivering excellence in every project

detailOriented.title: Detail-Oriented
detailOriented.description: We deliver polished, robust, and scalable solutions
